title: Our
Collection
hero.subtitle: Handpicked traditional garments & heritage craft, sourced from Algeria's finest artisan families

product1.name: Grand Ivory Burnous
product1.desc: A prestige burnous woven from the finest Tlemcen wool, featuring hand-stitched trim and a heritage drape favoured for weddings and celebrations.

product2.name: Constantine Silk Kaftan
product2.desc: Hand-embroidered with gold-thread motifs in the traditional Qasrantina style. Supplied with a matching sash belt.

product3.name: Chechia & Tagelmust Set
product3.desc: A complete headwear set — red felt chechia and indigo tagelmust — crafted by Kabyle weavers using looms unchanged for centuries.

product4.name: Ornate Khodmi Belt
product4.desc: An elaborately worked ceremonial belt in silver thread on deep burgundy velvet, secured with an engraved clasp. A rare collector's piece.

product5.name: Gold-Stitched Babouches
product5.desc: Soft leather babouches with hand-stitched gold embroidery across the toe and heel. Comfortable for all-day ceremonial wear.

product6.name: Midnight Djellaba
product6.desc: A deep navy djellaba with hand-braided closure toggles and discreet geometric trim at the cuffs and collar.

product7.name: Bridal Chedda Ensemble
product7.desc: Full bridal chedda set including the embroidered bolero, skirt, and head ornaments in traditional Qasrantina gold-work.

product8.name: Ghardaïa Prayer Rug
product8.desc: A hand-knotted M'zab geometric prayer rug in natural undyed wool, crafted by Mozabite weavers in Ghardaïa.

product9.name: Embroidered Haik Wrap
product9.desc: An exquisitely embroidered haik in fine white cotton with delicate floral edging, perfect for formal occasions.
